name.en: Saubhagya / DDUGJY (Pradhan Mantri Sahaj Bijli Har Ghar Yojana)
name.hi: सौभाग्य / दीन दयाल उपाध्याय ग्राम ज्योति योजना (प्रधानमंत्री सहज बिजली हर घर योजना)

config.mp_action: Forward to the local DISCOM (Jaipur Vidyut Vitran Nigam — JVVNL) for last-mile connection / distribution-infrastructure work.
config.notes: Household electrification and distribution infrastructure (transformers, poles, lines). Street-lighting is a municipal (ULB) subject, not this scheme.
